body_transformation: The body now features a lean, wiry frame with electric blue fur that shimmers with neon yellow streaks along the spiky back fur. The tail tip glows with vibrant yellow energy, its curled shape preserved but now crackling with neon green sparks. Leg stripes transform into glowing circuit patterns that pulse with electric blue light, while the pale cream underbelly becomes a smooth, reflective surface like polished chrome. The ear tips gain jagged lightning-bolt spines that shimmer with neon energy, maintaining the original rounded head structure.
signature_feature: Tail tip: jagged lightning-bolt spines with glowing neon green sparks and electric blue energy trails.
